## DAY 2026-03-17 (TW=1412.30, ~flat)
RESULTS: 676065 Bernie Sanders (0.12#3, +12.57 balanced - national figure not MN senators); 405816=Beit Awwa (obscure -5.82); 864964=Ali Larijani (had Khamenei 0.50 last-day swing, -5.95 limited by short hold).
LESSON reaffirmed: aggressive last-day high-conf swings backfire but short-hold limits damage; flat spread held longer is safer. cross-ref logical (Khamenei) but specific answer differed (Larijani).
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'388689','398208','666706','739439','512785','724111'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:92])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:135])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
